news.t: Tuttle Capital Management Launches the Tuttle Capital Magnificent 7 Income Blast ETF (MAGO)

holdings.infoBox: MAGO is an equity ETF with a total of 33 individual holdings. The top holdings are United States Treasury Bills 0% stock at 80.82%, Nvda 09/18/2026 165.01 C at 5.82%, Amzn 09/18/2026 200.01 C at 4.90%, Tsla 09/18/2026 350.01 C at 4.89%, and Aapl 09/18/2026 245.01 C at 4.58%.

overview.description: The Tuttle Capital Magnificent 7 Income Blast ETF (MAGO) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund aims to provide a combination of US equity participation in the Magnificent 7 and consistent income generation by actively managing long equity exposure, directly or synthetically, and short-put option spreads. The fund aims for equal weighting across the seven names. MAGO was launched on Dec 30, 2025 and is issued by Tuttle Capital.

data.title: Tuttle Capital Management Launches the Tuttle Capital Magnificent 7 Income Blast ETF (MAGO)
data.text: Greenwich, Connecticut--(Newsfile Corp. - December 30, 2025) - Tuttle Capital Management, a leading provider of thematic and alternatives ETFs, today announced the launch of the Tuttle Capital Magnifi...
